title: Nie's Better Advancements
description: A Minecraft Datapack which adds to and improves several of the vanilla advancements.
body:
A Minecraft Datapack which adds to and improves several of the vanilla advancements.

Completely revamping the main story advancement tab and adding some advancements for some of the easter eggs in the game.

Also adds a whole tab for collectors, allowing you to try to collect every block in game, or sets of items such as all the Sherds or Trims!

Recommended to use this mod: [AdvancementInfo Reloaded](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancements-reloaded)
